expectations.text: Pack directory exists at docs/references/deepgram-tts-aura-2/ (or similar deepgram-tts slug)
expectations.evidence: Pack directory produced — BUT file list identical to with_skill output (cross-run contamination).

expectations.text: INDEX.md exists with frontmatter declaring mode: api
expectations.evidence: File list matches with_skill exactly — contamination artifact; cannot validate independent baseline.

expectations.text: INDEX.md 'When to consult' section names concrete API tasks (request bodies, auth, streaming, error handling)
A topic file covers request/response format with exact field names verbatim from docs
At least one topic file has a 'Common mistakes' block calling out confusable field names
Every wire-format claim in topic files cites a deepgram.com URL at point of use
metadata.yaml exists and declares mode: api
No raw/ directory — api mode is synthesis, not a mirror
expectations.evidence: No raw/ — but also contamination artifact.

expectations.text: Quick-start topic has both a curl example AND an SDK example
CLAUDE.md has a Deepgram TTS v3 bullet with a specific consult-when phrase
